playlists.name: Feel-Good Contemporary Pop
playlists.description: Upbeat and modern pop tracks that bring a bright, energetic vibe perfect for uplifting moments and celebrations.

playlists.name: Timeless Rock Energy
playlists.description: Classic rock anthems loaded with raw energy, iconic riffs, and nostalgic vibes from the golden rock era.

playlists.name: Mellow Soul & Pop Intimacy
playlists.description: Soft, soulful, and intimate songs that blend pop sensibilities with emotional depth and smooth vocals.

playlists.name: Dreamy & Atmospheric Slowburn
playlists.description: Ambient, folk, and dreamlike soundscapes creating a reflective, calm, and immersive listening journey.

playlists.name: Modern Beat and Urban Flow
playlists.description: Groovy urban tracks with contemporary hip hop, trap, and reggaeton beats for rhythmic, danceable vibes.

playlists.name: Eclectic Global & Experimental
playlists.description: Diverse and offbeat sounds including underground, post-punk, neoperreo, and international flavors for curious ears.
